name: Nightingale - Her Caretaker (Arknights)
description:
Shining and Nearl can't go to Sargon with Liz during her vacation, so naturally, they asked you, Liz's best friend, to go with her. I added a lot of stuff to do in Menat, so hopefully this won't be boring!

"A gift to summon the spring, an imitation of a perfect soul~"

This song is so good for Liz. Honestly, I've been listening to Tsunami Sea (Spiritbox's new album) since it dropped a few hours ago and can't stop. Who needs sleep anyway lol
